requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — DOSM IEC-based MS Standards (230 V / 50 Hz Grid; Plug Types A / B / C)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — DOSM基于IEC的MS标准（230 V / 50 Hz电网；A/B/C型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — DOSM基於IEC的MS標準（230 V / 50 Hz電網；A/B/C型插頭）

summary.en: Laos operates a 230 V, 50 Hz national grid, administered by EDL (Electricite du Laos). Plug types A (US flat-blade, two-pin), B (US flat-blade with earth, three-pin), and C (European Schuko two-pin round) are all commonly in use, with no single standardised national plug type. DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, Ministry of Science and Technology) adopts IEC-based Lao national standards (MS standards) for electrical equipment safety, including for information technology and communications equipment. The applicable IEC base standard for IT/AV/communications devices is IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements). Mandatory application of DOSM MS electrical safety standards to specific product categories — including wireless routers, IoT hubs, and similar powered devices — is determined by MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) and DOSM regulatory instruments and should be confirmed directly with DOSM before import. CCC and CE electrical safety certifications are not recognised as substitutes for applicable Lao DOSM MS standard compliance. Voltage compatibility is a hard product requirement: equipment must be rated for 230 V (or a 220-240 V range) for the Lao grid; devices rated for 220 V only may not be suitable without re-rating or re-testing.
summary.zh: 老挝国家电网由EDL（老挝电力公司）管理，电压为230 V，频率为50 Hz。A型（美式平板双极）、B型（美式平板带接地三极）和C型（欧式圆形双极）插头均常见使用，无统一的全国标准插头类型。DOSM（标准计量局，科学技术部）采用基于IEC的老挝国家标准（MS标准）规范电气设备安全，包括信息技术和通信设备。IT/视听/通信设备适用的IEC基础标准为IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备——第1部分：安全要求）。DOSM MS电气安全标准对特定产品类别（包括无线路由器、物联网集线器及类似有源设备）的强制适用，由能源矿产部（MEM）和DOSM监管文件确定，进口前应直接向DOSM确认。CCC和CE电气安全认证不被接受作为适用老挝DOSM MS标准合规的替代。电压兼容性是硬性产品要求：设备须额定230 V（或220-240 V范围）以适用老挝电网；仅额定220 V的设备在未经重新额定或重新检测的情况下可能不适用。
summary.zht: 寮國國家電網由EDL（寮國電力公司）管理，電壓為230 V，頻率為50 Hz。A型（美式平板雙極）、B型（美式平板帶接地三極）和C型（歐式圓形雙極）插頭均常見使用，無統一的全國標準插頭類型。DOSM（標準計量局，科學技術部）採用基於IEC的寮國國家標準（MS標準）規範電氣設備安全，包括信息技術和通訊設備。IT/視聽/通訊設備適用的IEC基礎標準為IEC 62368-1（音視頻、信息和通訊技術設備——第1部分：安全要求）。DOSM MS電氣安全標準對特定產品類別（包括無線路由器、物聯網集線器及類似有源設備）的強制適用，由能源礦產部（MEM）和DOSM監管文件確定，進口前應直接向DOSM確認。CCC和CE電氣安全認證不被接受作為適用寮國DOSM MS標準合規的替代。電壓兼容性是硬性產品要求：設備須額定230 V（或220-240 V範圍）以適用寮國電網；僅額定220 V的設備在未經重新額定或重新檢測的情況下可能不適用。

standards_or_laws: Lao PDR DOSM MS standards (IEC-based) — electrical safety for information technology and communications equipment; mandatory status per product category determined by MEM/DOSM regulatory instruments
IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment; Part 1: Safety requirements (IEC base standard adopted by DOSM as reference for MS standards)
EDL grid technical specifications — 230 V / 50 Hz national grid (Electricite du Laos)
MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) regulatory instruments — determine mandatory application scope of DOSM MS electrical safety standards

summary.en: In China, information technology equipment safety is governed by GB 4943.1-2022 (Information technology equipment — Safety — Part 1: General requirements), which is technically equivalent to IEC 62368-1:2018 (second edition). Compliance with GB 4943.1-2022 is mandatory for CCC-listed IT equipment under CNCA-C17-01, enforced by SAMR. China's grid is 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz — the same 50 Hz frequency as Laos but a lower nominal voltage (220 V vs. 230 V Lao nominal). The plug type in China is Type A (flat-blade, two-pin) and Type I (three-flat-blade); Type C is less common. Products certified for 220 V only may require re-rating or re-testing for the Lao 230 V grid and multi-plug-type environment.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术设备安全由GB 4943.1-2022（信息技术设备——安全——第1部分：通用要求）规范，技术上等同于IEC 62368-1:2018（第二版）。GB 4943.1-2022合规对须进行CCC认证的信息技术设备（依据CNCA-C17-01，由市场监管总局执行）为强制要求。中国电网为220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相），50 Hz——与老挝频率相同（50 Hz），但额定电压较低（220 V对比老挝230 V）。中国插头类型为A型（平板双极）和I型（三平板）；C型较少见。仅额定220 V认证的产品可能需要重新额定或重新检测以满足老挝230 V电网及多插头类型环境的要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術設備安全由GB 4943.1-2022（信息技術設備——安全——第1部分：通用要求）規範，技術上等同於IEC 62368-1:2018（第二版）。GB 4943.1-2022合規對須進行CCC認證的信息技術設備（依據CNCA-C17-01，由市場監管總局執行）為強制要求。中國電網為220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相），50 Hz——與寮國頻率相同（50 Hz），但額定電壓較低（220 V對比寮國230 V）。中國插頭類型為A型（平板雙極）和I型（三平板）；C型較少見。僅額定220 V認證的產品可能需要重新額定或重新檢測以滿足寮國230 V電網及多插頭類型環境的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 — Information technology equipment; safety; Part 1: General requirements (equivalent to IEC 62368-1:2018 2nd edition) (SAMR/CNCA, mandatory under CCC for IT equipment, CNCA-C17-01)

gap.en: Key gaps are: (1) Voltage rating — Laos nominal grid is 230 V; China is 220 V. Equipment rated 220 V only may not meet the Lao 230 V grid requirement; manufacturers must use equipment rated 220-240 V or 230 V to ensure compatibility and safety margin. (2) Plug type — Laos uses plug types A, B, and C (multiple standards in market); China uses type A and I. Powered devices sold in Laos may need to supply or support multiple plug types or use a universal power supply. (3) DOSM MS standard version — the specific IEC 62368-1 version adopted by DOSM as a mandatory MS standard, and the product categories covered by mandatory application, should be verified with DOSM/MEM before import; mandatory status is not confirmed on the DOSM website. (4) CCC recognition — Chinese CCC test reports to GB 4943.1-2022 may be accepted as supporting technical evidence by DOSM but this is not confirmed; they do not automatically satisfy mandatory Lao MS standard requirements. (5) Test laboratory — it is unknown whether Chinese CNAS-accredited safety test laboratory reports are accepted by DOSM.
gap.zh: 主要差距包括：（1）额定电压——老挝电网额定电压为230 V，中国为220 V。仅额定220 V的设备可能不满足老挝230 V电网要求；制造商须使用额定220-240 V或230 V的设备以确保兼容性和安全裕量。（2）插头类型——老挝市场使用A型、B型和C型插头（多种标准并存）；中国使用A型和I型。在老挝销售的有源设备可能需要配套或支持多种插头类型，或使用通用电源。（3）DOSM MS标准版本——DOSM作为强制MS标准采用的具体IEC 62368-1版本，以及强制适用所覆盖的产品类别，须在进口前向DOSM/MEM核实；强制状态未在DOSM网站上确认。（4）CCC认可——中国GB 4943.1-2022 CCC检测报告可能被DOSM作为佐证技术材料接受，但尚未确认；不自动满足老挝强制MS标准要求。（5）检测实验室——目前尚不清楚DOSM是否接受中国CNAS认可安全检测实验室的报告。
gap.zht: 主要差距包括：（1）額定電壓——寮國電網額定電壓為230 V，中國為220 V。僅額定220 V的設備可能不滿足寮國230 V電網要求；製造商須使用額定220-240 V或230 V的設備以確保兼容性和安全裕量。（2）插頭類型——寮國市場使用A型、B型和C型插頭（多種標準並存）；中國使用A型和I型。在寮國銷售的有源設備可能需要配套或支持多種插頭類型，或使用通用電源。（3）DOSM MS標準版本——DOSM作為強制MS標準採用的具體IEC 62368-1版本，以及強制適用所涵蓋的產品類別，須在進口前向DOSM/MEM核實；強制狀態未在DOSM網站上確認。（4）CCC認可——中國GB 4943.1-2022 CCC檢測報告可能被DOSM作為佐證技術材料接受，但尚未確認；不自動滿足寮國強制MS標準要求。（5）檢測實驗室——目前尚不清楚DOSM是否接受中國CNAS認可安全檢測實驗室的報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for product categories covered by MEM/DOSM regulatory instruments under applicable DOSM MS standards) — confirm specific product category scope with DOSM; 230 V / 50 Hz voltage rating and plug type A/B/C compatibility are hard product requirements for the Lao market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-listed IT equipment — GB 4943.1-2022 under CNCA-C17-01 (SAMR/CNCA); grid voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz; plug types A and I

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), Ministry of Science and Technology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos operates a 230 V / 50 Hz grid; wireless/IoT devices must be rated for 230 V (or 220-240 V range) — equipment rated 220 V only may not be suitable. Plug types A, B, and C are all in use; powered devices should accommodate multiple plug types or use universal power supplies. DOSM IEC-based MS standards govern electrical safety; mandatory application status for specific wireless/IoT categories must be confirmed with MEM/DOSM before import. Chinese CCC test reports (GB 4943.1-2022) may support but do not automatically satisfy Lao requirements. Verified: false — confirm current DOSM/MEM mandatory scope before relying on this row.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝电网为230 V / 50 Hz；无线/物联网设备必须额定230 V（或220-240 V范围）——仅额定220 V的设备可能不适用。A型、B型和C型插头均在使用；有源设备应支持多种插头类型或使用通用电源。DOSM基于IEC的MS标准规范电气安全；特定无线/物联网类别的强制适用范围须在进口前向MEM/DOSM确认。中国CCC检测报告（GB 4943.1-2022）可作为佐证但不自动满足老挝要求。已核实：否——在依赖本行内容前，请确认DOSM/MEM当前强制范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國電網為230 V / 50 Hz；無線/物聯網設備必須額定230 V（或220-240 V範圍）——僅額定220 V的設備可能不適用。A型、B型和C型插頭均在使用；有源設備應支持多種插頭類型或使用通用電源。DOSM基於IEC的MS標準規範電氣安全；特定無線/物聯網類別的強制適用範圍須在進口前向MEM/DOSM確認。中國CCC檢測報告（GB 4943.1-2022）可作為佐證但不自動滿足寮國要求。已核實：否——在依賴本行內容前，請確認DOSM/MEM當前強制範圍。
